why_proximity_matters: The owner will likely read them together, so retained overlap can self-resolve quickly.
how_it_changes_harmlessness: Raises tolerance for short repeated overlap.
risk_if_ignored: The system may over-split material that is safer to keep duplicated nearby.

why_proximity_matters: Condition/method children are semantically dependent and usually studied in one cluster.
how_it_changes_harmlessness: Makes duplication of tightly bound parent text more acceptable.
risk_if_ignored: Owner may face needless fragmentation and manhunt.

relationship_pattern: distant branches across different condition families
why_proximity_matters: Retained overlap is less likely to self-resolve and more likely to create ambiguity.
how_it_changes_harmlessness: Greatly lowers tolerance for keeping unrelated short text together.
risk_if_ignored: Silent confusion persists because the owner may not encounter the resolving excerpt soon.

relationship_pattern: same text preserved across unrelated شروط
proximity_level: far even if physically nearby in the source
why_proximity_matters: Semantic distance matters more than source adjacency.
how_it_changes_harmlessness: A short piece can still be harmful if it semantically belongs to another شرط.
